title: Loot & Explore - Dehydration Compat
description: Datapack for Modpack Devs. This Datapack adds the Loot&Explore Drinks to the Dehydration Tags.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWOS0Npp/images/9728f9d1ccc74053e78f33fe5c855672a24c78dd.png)

### 🚨Required Mods
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore)
- [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration)


This optional datapack was mainly created for Modpack Devs. It adds the Loot & Explore consumables to the Dehydration Mod Tags.

![Espresso](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWOS0Npp/images/7a67a8d7ccead313afb8e0babdf241ec730d576f.png)

**The following drinks gets added to the tags with this datapack:**
- LNE Buff Drinks, Soups and Stews
